---
name: Bug report
about: Validator, corpus, or example produces wrong behavior
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Component

- [ ] Reference validator (`validator/python/`)
- [ ] Conformance corpus (`validator/corpus/`)
- [ ] Example (`examples/`)
- [ ] Other

## Expected behavior

What should have happened, citing the relevant spec section.

## Actual behavior

What happened, including any error output.

## Repro

Minimal A2AL message or command that reproduces the issue.

```text
<paste here>
```
